high_concern_flags.detail: Row guidance described § 707 as under '19 Del Code Chapter 9' framing; actually § 707 is under Chapter 7 of Title 19 (general labor regulations), not Chapter 9 (minimum wage). Resolved by primary citation to Title 19 Chapter 7 Subchapter I.

Row guidance described pay frequency under § 1102 as 'at least monthly (some industries weekly required)'. Verified primary headline rule is 'at least once a month' with employer discretion to pay more frequently; the 'some industries weekly required' carve-out (e.g., banks, factories) could not be cleanly sourced in the current Title 19 Chapter 11; flagged for legal review. Page text uses the unambiguous monthly-floor framing.
Youth/training wage of $8.75 first-90-days under 19 Del. C. § 902(c) referenced from sibling-source secondary citations; primary statutory citation should be re-verified in next 30-day refresh.
